title: Northlantic Insurance auto-insurance rate card: InDesign data-merge a supplied premium-tier CSV into the client's authored .indd, refresh the disclosure footer, and export a print-ready PDF + high-res JPEG
one_line_ask: Run the client's authored InDesign rate-card template through an InDesign data-merge against a supplied auto-insurance premium-tier CSV, place the on-brand logo and licensed background texture, refresh the compliance disclosure footer, and export a press-ready PDF plus a high-resolution JPEG.

panel.text_found: The insurance rates, terms, and conditions contained herein are for informational purposes only and are subject to policy provisions, exclusions, limitations, and conditions. Actual coverage, premiums, and eligibility are governed by state insurance laws, regulations, and individual underwriting criteria. This document does not constitute a contract of insurance and is not an offer of coverage. Rates and availability may vary by jurisdiction and are subject to change without prior notice. All policy forms and rates have been filed with the respective State Department of Insurance in accordance with regulatory requirements. Coverage is subject to terms set forth in the applicable policy documents, which should be reviewed carefully. This communication is for licensed agents and brokers only, and not for distribution to the public. No warranty, express or implied, is made regarding the accuracy or completeness of this information. Rates effective Q3, filed with State Dept. of Insurance.

issues: Very slight luminance noise in background band (acceptable per brief)
Font size is extremely small but readable at native resolution
Text block could use marginally more bottom padding for visual balance
